dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7047 IH: Health Care for Homeless Veterans Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ruiz introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to expand eligibility for, and make permanent, certain programs for homeless veterans.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Health Care for Homeless Veterans Act.

section.header: Health Care for Homeless Veterans program: expansion of eligibility; permanent authorization

subsection.text: Section 2002(b)(1) of title 38, United States Code, is amended by striking sections 2011, 2012, 2013, and inserting sections 2011, 2012, 2013, 2031,.
Section 2031 of such title is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking the enumerator.

section.header: Permanent authorization of program of additional services for homeless veterans
section.text: Section 2033 of title 38, United States Code, is amended by striking subsection (d).
